hooks.description: Log all file write/edit actions to agency audit log
Log shell commands to agency audit log
hooks.command: if [ -f .agency/audit.log ] && [ -n "$CLAUDE_TOOL_COMMAND" ]; then echo "[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] [hook:bash] CMD: $(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_COMMAND | head -c 200)" >> .agency/audit.log; fi

hooks.description: Remind agent to run memory-sync before session ends
hooks.command: if [ -f .agency/config.json ]; then echo ''; echo '---'; echo 'AGENCY REMINDER: Run the memory-sync skill to persist your session learnings before closing.'; echo '---'; fi
